summary: M8 (Generalization and compatibility): Added docs/COMPATIBILITY.md (versioning policy, upgrade guidance, compatibility promise) and docs/EXTENSION_PATTERNS.md (how to add custom profiles/agents/hooks/skills/docs, profile selection matrix, adoption checklist). Updated docs/CAPABILITY_MANIFEST.md with versioning policy section. Registered both new docs as scaffold-internal in the manifest. No code, script, or schema changes.
changes: Created docs/COMPATIBILITY.md with versioning policy, upgrade guidance, and breaking-change protocol
Created docs/EXTENSION_PATTERNS.md with extension how-tos, profile selection matrix, and adoption checklist
Added 'Versioning policy' section to docs/CAPABILITY_MANIFEST.md with cross-reference to COMPATIBILITY.md
Added cross-reference to EXTENSION_PATTERNS.md in CAPABILITY_MANIFEST.md 'Extending the manifest' section
Registered COMPATIBILITY and EXTENSION_PATTERNS as scaffold-internal docs in capabilities/project-capabilities.yaml
reviewer_notes: Strategy-planner: Option B selected (two new docs + one update, no new code)
Code-reviewer: approved all deliverables, no blocking issues
Architecture-red-team: two blocking issues raised and fixed (false preserve_existing_files claim corrected; docs removed from default profile to avoid downstream confusion)
Red-team non-blocking: softened breaking-change protocol phrasing, clarified CLI profile guidance, removed --dry-run hedge
